name: Central Station
description: Main railway and metro hub serving the entire Metro City, with 12 platforms and connections to all major lines.

name: Tech Park
description: Major technology and innovation hub with over 200 companies, co-working spaces, and startup incubators.

name: City Hall
description: Municipal government headquarters, civic center, and public services hub in the heart of downtown.

name: University Campus
description: Metro City University with 30,000 students, multiple faculties, and research centers spread across 50 acres.

name: Metro Medical Center
description: Level-1 trauma center and regional medical hub with 800 beds, emergency services, and specialty clinics.

name: Financial District
description: Banking, finance, and insurance hub with headquarters of major financial institutions.

name: Riverside Park
description: Waterfront park with cycling paths, jogging tracks, outdoor events space, and riverside cafes.

name: Airport Terminal
description: Metro City International Airport with 3 terminals, 50 gates, and connections to 150 destinations worldwide.

name: Shopping Mall
description: Metro Mall — 5-story premier shopping destination with 300 stores, food court, cinema, and entertainment.

name: Sports Arena
description: Multi-purpose 20,000-seat arena hosting basketball, hockey, concerts, and major sporting events.

name: North Suburbs Hub
description: Northern commuter interchange connecting suburban train lines, express buses, and park-and-ride facilities.

name: Industrial Zone
description: Manufacturing and logistics district with warehouses, factories, and freight terminals.

name: Old Town Square
description: Historic district with colonial-era architecture, museums, restaurants, and tourist attractions.

name: Science Museum
description: Interactive science and technology museum with planetarium, innovation lab, and STEM education programs.

name: East Residential Area
description: Dense residential neighborhood with apartments, schools, parks, and neighborhood retail.
